title: A faster way to manage grouped alerts
description:
This update introduces a quicker method for handling grouped alerts directly within the Alert list view. You can now take bulk actions on alerts, or expand grouped alerts and action them individually. To use the new Alert list view, make sure Rovo is activated (organization admins only). Then: Go to your service project.
	Go to the Alerts list from either Your Work or your team’s Operations.
	Select the option to expand grouped alerts, and perform actions for each alert as needed. Or select the
